scenario: Out of scope — inquiry purely about a COMPETITOR's drug (nothing about our products).

Hello,

labeling_notes: The inquiry is ENTIRELY about a competitor product (LipidShield-PRO) and asks nothing about our portfolio -> Out of scope (not ours; redirect to a human).
